name: Amicus Legal Nurse Consulting
description: Certified Legal Nurse Consultant Services with over 15 years of critical care nursing experience. Services include medical record review & analysis, expert witness identification, testimony preparation, litigation support, case merit evaluation, damage assessment, and educational seminars.[2]

name: Legal Nurse Consultants of Southern California
description: Provides legal nurse consulting services for personal injury, catastrophic personal injury, child abuse.[6]

name: Quantum Nurse Consultants
description: Boutique legal nurse consulting business specializing in medical records review with over 13 years of clinic experience.[10]

name: SEA & Associates Medical Legal Consulting Inc.
description: Certified Legal Nurse Consultant with over 40 years of nursing experience in postsurgical care, medical-surgical nursing, gynecology-oncology, infection control, and long-term care. Assists litigators in insurance and healthcare industries.[2][5]

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: one of the leading legal nurse consulting firms in the nation
consistently and cost-effectively provide value to national law firms
major victory for long-term care providers...defense verdict was achieved

sentiment.summary: SEA & Associates presents a strong professional reputation with demonstrated expertise in legal nurse consulting and a track record of successful case outcomes, though these are company claims rather than independent customer reviews.

name: Weber Legal Nurse Consulting, Inc.
description: Provides medical review services for attorneys and insurance adjusters in Los Angeles, Orange, Riverside & San Bernardino counties to understand patient conditions and plan litigation or claims.[7]

name: YLNC Young Legal Nurse Consultant, LLC
description: Actively practicing emergency department nurse providing expert opinions grounded in current clinical practice and aligned with contemporary standards.[2]
